Functions and structures for 1-bit graphics operations, including bit block transfer and framebuffer management.


## Files
- **[bitblt_private.c](bitblt_private.c.md)**: Functions for bit block transfer operations with support for compositing modes and tinting in 1-bit graphics.
- **[framebuffer.c](framebuffer.c.md)**: Functions for managing a 1-bit framebuffer, including clearing and marking dirty regions.
- **[framebuffer.h](framebuffer.h.md)**: Defines a `FrameBuffer` structure and related macros for managing a 1-bit graphics framebuffer.
